pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target JDK 21.
Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugin versions may fail to compile or recognize JDK 21 language features and class files.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace separate source and target configuration with the unified release flag.
pom.xml.why_exists: Using source/target with JDK 21 can lead to mismatched bytecode or missing module path support; release is the standard for modern JDKs.

src/test/java/com/harishkannarao/demo/fe.general_idea: Refactor instanceof check to use pattern matching for cleaner code.
